query:
SELECT s.id, s.user_id, u.username, s.expires_at
FROM app_sessions s
JOIN app_users u ON s.user_id = u.id
WHERE s.expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY s.expires_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

FROM app_sessions s

ORDER BY s.expires_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
